scripts.test:visual:docker: docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/work -v /work/node_modules -w /work -e CI=1 mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.61.1-noble bash -lc 'npm ci && npm run test:visual'
scripts.test:visual:docker:update: docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/work -v /work/node_modules -w /work -e CI=1 mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.61.1-noble bash -lc 'npm ci && npm run test:visual:update'
